title: Gakfedd tribe
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{MultipleIssues|citation|expand}}
The '''Gakfedd tribe''', also called the '''Gakfedd clan''', was a clan of [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] native to [[Pzob/Legends|Pzob]]. In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], they were captured along with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], his companions, and their rival clan, the [[Klagg tribe|Klaggs]], and indoctrinated on board the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] battlemoon ''The [[Eye of Palpatine]]''. Their indoctrination was almost successful—they learned to speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] and were turned into relatively good [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. They constantly fought the Klaggs, whom they considered [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]. When they were evacuated from the battlemoon, they refused reorientation and negotiated with [[Drost Elegin]] to be taken on as bodyguards.

They assisted Luke Skywalker, [[Cray Mingla]], and [[Nichos Marr/Legends|Nichos Marr]] when the three were stranded on the planet.

==Members==
*[[Bullyak]] - Clan Matron (alpha [[Gender/Legends|female]])
*[[Ugbuz]] - Clan Warlord (alpha male)
*[[Krok]] - Warlord (junior husband of Bullyak)

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
